headline: Mapping Dense Spatial Networks With Wifi-DensePose
lede: This prototype explores the intersection of wireless signal analysis and human pose estimation. It serves as a raw, experimental sandbox for researchers looking to track movement without traditional camera optics.

headline: DeerFlow 2.0 Orchestrates Multi-Agent Research Workflows
lede: DeerFlow 2.0 provides the structural blueprints for long-running autonomous tasks. By integrating sandboxed execution environments with specialized search capabilities, it establishes a reliable framework for complex, agent-led research.

headline: Moonshine Scales Automatic Speech Recognition Locally
lede: Engineers now have access to high-performance speech recognition models designed for local execution. This toolkit strips away external dependencies, focusing on raw inference speed and integration efficiency.

headline: Curating Agent Skills for Advanced Context Engineering
lede: Mastering the nuances of agentic context requires a rigorous study of prompt engineering and system design. This archive organizes critical methodologies for developers building sophisticated, context-aware artificial intelligence.

headline: Superpowers Standardizes Agentic Development Lifecycles
lede: Standardization is the bedrock of scalable software development. Superpowers embeds rigorous engineering protocols directly into coding agents, ensuring that AI-generated output adheres to proven industry best practices.

headline: Building Hierarchical Multi-Agent Swarms With RuFlo
lede: Designing robust swarms requires a clear understanding of consensus algorithms and topology. This project provides the step-by-step framework to transition from simple chat interfaces to sophisticated, self-optimizing agent ecosystems.

headline: Hello Agents Captures Rapid Developer Adoption
lede: Community interest in agentic frameworks has surged, signaling a shift toward more capable, autonomous tooling. This repository serves as a central hub for navigating the rapidly expanding ecosystem of AI agents.

headline: GitNexus Maps Codebases Into Interactive Knowledge Graphs
lede: GitNexus transforms static source code into flowing, traversable knowledge streams. By indexing call chains and dependencies, it provides AI agents with the deep architectural awareness required for precise refactoring.

headline: AIRI Delivers Private Cyber-Living AI Companions
lede: Ownership of AI identity is becoming a vital concern for digital creators. AIRI offers a localized, self-hosted infrastructure for interactive companions, keeping user data and personality models securely within their own environments.

headline: Claude Code Accelerates CLI-Based Engineering Workflows
lede: The terminal remains the most efficient interface for rapid development. Claude Code brings advanced reasoning directly to the command line, enabling developers to execute complex operations without leaving their preferred environment.
